textByHash.6e1c0952178f0bcb956249de16af2f6915289bb4: Greetings . Welcome you are in the test of combat.
textByHash.7671ee6ea4b479f9d8eca877b75ae90e5f28dcc5: A spare suit of plate armour need you will. Full helm, plate leggings and platebody yes? Placing it in the centre of the magical machines you will be doing. KA- POOF! The armour, it attacks most furiously as if
textByHash.e1d59a56d0f9d2352ec122776ea7e0734c74256c: alive! Kill it you must, yes.
textByHash.2b8e5c42a258d0c6126fbc76323aaaf7ccd8a7d8: Yes. It is as you are saying. For this earn tokens you will. Also gain experience in combat you will. Trained long and hard here have I.
textByHash.f4b1856d41c3988bbe768666ce48cad840f23e19: Lose armour you will if damaged too much it becomes. Rare this is, but still possible. If kill you the armour does, also lose armour you will.
textByHash.3d0a156a1e90ac50e2a1592e53feeee173cd0888: Make them I did, with magics.
textByHash.bdce2efae58d802c61b3a08a9399a4e9b9c99f5b: A skilled warrior also am I. Harrallak mistakes does not make. Potential in my invention he sees and opportunity grasps.
textByHash.12802f212b489cbf9ba4a6f889a46780d512e02c: No space you have carry them for.
textByHash.8c4ebe7e3f59df2d0bb534c35dac46a3ee70efaf: Yes yes! Earned you have tokens!
textByHash.c047175a9883a38d02f8663a58eeabaf8f40a080: No tokens earned have you. In training activities participate you must.
textByHash.ea7fdc275b42a59e9897ca6ab3c45006191c3402: Correct you are. Not killed it was. Collected your armour I did.
textByHash.c0ca1e9664e166d51e0fb62e8e688b52c7660143: Space you will need in your pack.
textByHash.29451b860c5f5456a6978b4c7b9f7ca094c96301: Plain full plate armour in those machines only you may use, of appropriate materials. When other items used, bad things happen, yes!
textByHash.d3fee72347539fc3ede1bfa83607b4a4ea3880cb: Those things which cannot be seen, perceive them.
textByHash.2a30d0d81753b5ca92ca095e22bc3de93215fd13: Do nothing which is of no use.
textByHash.bbae0f3462ddb00e219fe59933899e56fc4a1f83: Gain and loss between you must distinguish.
textByHash.33c5a863a5dd6a621217e66a7cc5a464769c355d: Way of the warrior this is.
textByHash.40af35a4718ea33065d3364c14fe0552fd25ec83: Ways of all professions know you.
textByHash.3a63d22db11ba3a71969fd6290bbdc9ba837f6c0: Judgment and understanding for everything develop you must.
